title: Grilled Rainbow Trout with Roasted Vegetables
description: A simple and flavorful dish featuring grilled rainbow trout with a variety of roasted vegetables.

ingredients.name: Roasted Vegetables
ingredients.amount: 1 cup (mixed bell peppers, zucchini, and onions)

instructions: Season trout fillets with salt, pepper, and garlic powder.
Brush grill grates with olive oil to prevent sticking.
Grill trout fillets for 4-5 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, toss roasted vegetables with olive oil, salt, and pepper.
Roast in the oven at 425°F (220°C) for 15-20 minutes, or until tender.
Serve trout fillets with roasted vegetables and a squeeze of lemon juice.
Garnish with chopped parsley, if desired.
